CloneGithubOrg 1.1.1
Copyright (C) 2026 chadly

  -u, --username    The username to use when authenticating to clone
                    repositories.

  -p, --password    The password (personal access token) to use when
                    authenticating to the Github API and to clone repositories.

  -o, --org         Required. The Github organization from which to clone
                    repositories.

  --help            Display this help screen.

  --version         Display version information.
